overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy exploring sunlit ancient stone ruins of a tropical coastal citadel. She traverses a grand plaza with towering temple structures, ascends weathered stone stairs, and reaches a cliffside overlook revealing distant waterfalls and misty mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple plaza with towering stone structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the massive temple towers, weapon shouldered

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the temple entrance observing the plaza

entered.detail: tall ornate stone towers with intricate carvings and blue decorative elements at the top
intricate bronze-colored metal gate with geometric patterns and chain barriers
weathered stone tiles with moss growing between cracks
tall tropical palm trees lining the plaza edges

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a grand open plaza of ancient stone ruins under a bright partly cloudy sky. The massive temple towers dominate the center background while palm trees sway at the edges. A robed NPC stands near the temple entrance as Aloy approaches the base of the main structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending along temple wall

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase leading up the temple structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the weathered stone stairs along the temple wall, moving toward the upper levels

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the top of the stairs watching Aloy approach

entered.detail: broad weathered stone steps with carved edges leading upward along the building
ornate carved stone balustrade with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by carved railings, moving from the open plaza into a more confined space alongside the temple wall. The temple towers shift to the left as she climbs, and a guard stands watch at the stairway summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: clifftop overlook terrace with ocean views

events.description: emerging from the stairwell onto the open overlook terrace with panoramic ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved terrace, approaching the railing to view the distant landscape and waterfalls

entered.detail: low carved stone railing lining the cliff edge with decorative pillars
expansive view of misty ocean and distant tropical coastline
lush red and green tropical plants in stone planters along the walkway
tall waterfall cascading down distant cliffs into the misty valley below

segments.scene_description: Aloy emerges onto a sunlit cliffside terrace with sweeping ocean views. She walks along the curved stone balustrade past tropical flowering plants, with a magnificent waterfall becoming visible in the distant misty valley as she moves along the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic viewpoint overlooking misty valley and waterfalls

events.description: character slows to a stop, focusing on the waterfall and distant ruins in the valley

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook railing, surveying the vast misty landscape with waterfalls and distant ruins

entered.detail: primitive wooden platform structure extending from the cliff edge
ancient stone structures visible across the misty valley on the far mountainside

segments.scene_description: Aloy pauses at the scenic overlook, the camera panning to reveal a breathtaking vista of mist-filled valleys, cascading waterfalls, and distant ruins. The sun backlights the mountain peaks as she stands near a wooden scaffolding structure, taking in the panoramic view of the ancient landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the grounded scale of an ancient stone plaza to a breathtaking panoramic vista atop a coastal cliff. It begins with Aloy walking through a grand open plaza beneath towering temple structures and swaying palm trees, approaching the base of the main ruins. As she ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by carved railings, the perspective shifts from the open square to a more confined path along the temple wall before reaching a guard at the summit. The scene then opens onto a sunlit cliffside terrace where she walks past tropical flowering plants along a curved balustrade, revealing a distant waterfall in a misty valley. Finally, the camera pans wide as Aloy pauses by a wooden scaffolding structure, capturing a sweeping view of mist-filled valleys and backlit mountain peaks.
